title: Spicy Chewy Portuguese Onion Stir-fry
description: A spicy and chewy Portuguese onion dish, perfect for a light dinner or snack. This recipe is suitable for those following a fodmap-friendly diet.
instructions: Heat sesame oil in a wok or large frying pan over medium-high heat.
Add sliced spring onions and minced garlic to the pan. Stir-fry for about 3 minutes until they start to soften slightly.
Season with chili flakes, salt, and pepper according to your taste preference. Mix well.
Sprinkle finely chopped ginger on top of the stir-fried mixture and continue stirring for another minute or so.
The dish is ready when it's evenly coated with the flavors and chewy in texture due to long cooking time.
